steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: Camilla experiences a change in how she perceives her immediate surroundings. The right quotation must explicitly contrast a former perception with a new one of the same surroundings.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice B states that all nature was as she had found it before (same surroundings) but Camilla now sensed a new strangeness, a vast desolation (changed perception). That's the exact before-and-after shift the claim describes.

Choices A, C, and D describe physical actions or emotions but don't show a changed perception of unchanged surroundings.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
